title: Refine activity repository carousel
summary: Updated the Activity overview hero copy and replaced the stretching repository overview grid with a recent repositories carousel. Repository cards now stay compact, sort by latest use, and scroll horizontally when there are more repos than fit the available width.
userVisibleChange: The Product snapshots section now uses clearer copy and shows recently used repositories as compact cards directly beneath it, with horizontal scrolling when needed instead of oversized stretched cards.

risks.title: Hidden scrollbar may reduce discoverability
risks.mitigation: Cards are partially clipped when overflowing and use snap scrolling; the section also shows the repository count.

timeline.title: Rewrote overview copy
timeline.summary: Replaced the generic explanatory sentence with concise copy focused on reviewing recorded product states and returning to recent repositories.

timeline.title: Built recent repository carousel
timeline.summary: Rendered all recent repositories as fixed-width cards in a horizontal scroll container and added latest-use sorting.

timeline.title: Verified responsive behavior
timeline.summary: Ran build/tests and Playwright checks for multi-repository tablet and mobile carousel behavior.

decisions.title: Keep Product snapshots as the hero
decisions.rationale: The user wanted to preserve the Product snapshots section but make the supporting copy clearer.

decisions.title: Use a horizontal carousel for recent repositories
decisions.rationale: Recent repos should stay compact cards under the hero, and horizontal scrolling prevents a long repo list from dominating the page.

decisions.title: Sort repositories by latest use
decisions.rationale: The row should prioritize the repositories users most recently worked in, falling back to activity count and name for stable ordering.

validation.output: tsc --noEmit and vite build completed; embedded UI assets copied to cmd/eve/ui_dist.

With six temporary repositories, tablet width showed fixed 252px cards inside a horizontally scrolling carousel and no page-level horizontal overflow; mobile width showed 224px cards, carousel scrolling, and no page-level overflow.

artifacts.description: Tablet-width recent repositories carousel with multiple repos.
Mobile-width recent repositories carousel with compact scrollable cards.
